hero.name: Deepankar Sandhibigraha
hero.role: Senior Full Stack Engineer & Team Lead
hero.summary: I am a Full Stack Team Lead with 7+ years of experience architecting scalable web products. My core zone is React, Next.js, and Node.js on AWS, where I combine clean engineering with measurable business outcomes.

professional.title: The Professional Deep-Dive
professional.intro: I do not just ship features. I build systems designed for growth, reliability, and long-term maintainability with strong quality gates and developer experience.
professional.greenfield: As the greenfield engineer for a multi-tenant Online Enrollment Application, I designed dynamic provider-specific forms and branding flows that helped onboard new clients 40% faster.
professional.reliability: I also contributed to keeping a ticketing platform up during major events with concurrent load.
professional.mentorship: I have led teams since early in my career, with strong ownership of sprint execution, code review standards, and mentorship for junior engineers.
professional.frontend: I am a ReactJS and NodeJS developer, experienced across the full development lifecycle, from bundling strategies to scalable APIs.
professional.quality: I push testing as culture, with CI/CD quality gates and automated coverage using Jest, Cypress, and Playwright.
professional.workflows: I actively integrate AI agents into daily workflows to accelerate delivery and eliminate repetitive boilerplate.

tinkerer.title: The After Hours Tinkerer
tinkerer.intro: When work ends, curiosity takes over. I spend time building and fixing systems in both digital and physical form.
tinkerer.homelab: I run self-hosted services including a My website, Jellyfin media server and private photo stacks with Immich.
tinkerer.linux: I am constantly experimenting with Linux environments and enjoy setting up reverse proxy, ssh for secure remote access.
tinkerer.analog: I am comfortable with home electrical work, from wiring a new room to setting up breakers, solar panels and troubleshooting. If it carries current, I want to understand it.
tinkerer.balance: I reset through gardening and photography, slowing down after high-velocity release cycles.
